_comment: Auto-generated in-character comments on Field Report articles. Keyed by article slug. Each comment is by another staff member (not the article author), in their voice, max 220 chars, capped 3 per article.

the-case-for-functional-girth.text: The Saturn V's girth IS the mechanism. Five F-1 engines require a fuel cross-section that cannot be reduced without ceasing to function. Per Thiccctionary bylaw 4(c): functional mass qualifies. Bart, read the excerpt.
